snippet.title: Subhath Sanjula - Shaheena (ŗ∑āŗ∑Ąŗ∑ďŗ∂Īŗ∑Ź) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA‚ÄôS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka

snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

Meemure Village | Sri Lanka
___________________________
Meemure is an isolated village in the Central Province of Sri Lanka, located 324m above sea level and hidden amongst the mountains. The only way to reach it is from the  ‚ÄėHunnasgiriya‚Äô mountain, which is part of the Knuckles range, approximately 50km from Kandy. It‚Äôs a difficult trail of 33km from Hunnasgiriya to Meemure with many tricky spots, though the view along it is excellent. The village itself receives abundant water in the form of waterfalls that have their sources in the evergreen forests of the Knuckles. East of the village lies the pyramid shaped Lakegala mountain; while the west is dominated by the picturesque Knuckles range. The northern boundary of Meemure borders a forest which runs to the ‚ÄėPitawala Pathana‚Äô grassland; and the south is bounded by Heen River.

snippet.title: Julius Mitchell - A Change is Gonna Come|  Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA‚ÄôS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj | Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‚Äė4 Idiots‚Äô group
Pappambadi Periya Melam Jama Munusami Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‚ÄėGeoshred‚Äô Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‚ÄėPei‚Äô Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G ‚Äď S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam ‚Äď R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed ‚Äď Diamond Babu

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

snippet.title: Kamal Sir has Watched my Video - Blacksheep Award Function ūüĒ• - Emotional Day - Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#Kamal #BlackSheepAward #Irfansview 

A very big day for me, getting recognition for what we do gives us the real happiness. I would like to thank Black sheep for creating such a wonderful moment and Irfan's View family for supporting from the beginning. I will never every forget this day as I got a chance to stand near Ulaga Nayagan Kamal Haasan. He recognized me after seeing me and said he watches my videos. What more will I ask when he gave me the feel of real victory. I was in the Seventh heaven and I went speechless.
_______________________________

snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA‚ÄôS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

snippet.title: Bobby Lashley Crushes The Miz To Become New WWE Champion | 2nd March, 2021 | WWE RAW | Fresh
snippet.description:
Bobby Lashley is the new WWE Champion after a crushing victory over The Miz. The Miz tries to swing the championship belt towards Lashley to get disqualified but to no effect. He later tries to get off of the ring but the lumberjacks prevent him from doing so. Lashley then proceeds to beat him up and end things with a crushing Hurt Lock for the win.
.
.

ŗ∂Öŗ∂īŗ∑í ŗ∑Éŗ∂łŗ∂∂ŗ∂Ľ ŗ∑Äŗ∑Źŗ∂Ľŗ∑äŗ∂≠ŗ∑Źŗ∂öŗ∂Ľŗ∂ęŗ∂ļŗ∂öŗ∑ä ŗ∂öŗ∂Ľŗ∂Ī ŗ∂∂ŗ∑Ä ŗ∂łŗ∑Äŗ∑Ź ŗ∂īŗ∑ôŗ∂Īŗ∑äŗ∑Äŗ∂Īŗ∑äŗ∂Īŗ∑ö ŗ∂Īŗ∑Ď. ŗ∂Öŗ∂īŗ∂ß ŗ∂łŗ∂≠ŗ∂ļŗ∂öŗ∑ä ŗ∂≠ŗ∑íŗ∂ļŗ∑ôŗ∂Īŗ∑Äŗ∑Ź. ŗ∂īŗ∑ä‚Äćŗ∂Ľŗ∂Ęŗ∑Źŗ∂≠ŗ∂Īŗ∑äŗ∂≠ŗ∑ä‚Äćŗ∂Ľŗ∑Äŗ∑Źŗ∂Įŗ∂ļ, ŗ∂Īŗ∑íŗ∂Įŗ∑Ąŗ∑É, ŗ∂Īŗ∑Äŗ∑ďŗ∂Ī ŗ∂Üŗ∂ęŗ∑äŗ∂©ŗ∑Ēŗ∂öŗ∂Ľŗ∂ę ŗ∑Éŗ∂āŗ∂öŗ∂Ĺŗ∑äŗ∂ī, ŗ∑Äŗ∂©ŗ∑Ź ŗ∑Äŗ∑íŗ∑Äŗ∑ėŗ∂≠ ŗ∑Äŗ∑Ė ŗ∂Üŗ∂Ľŗ∑äŗ∂ģŗ∑íŗ∂ö ŗ∑Éŗ∂āŗ∂öŗ∂Ĺŗ∑äŗ∂ī ŗ∂Öŗ∂īŗ∂ß ŗ∂≠ŗ∑íŗ∂ļŗ∑ôŗ∂Īŗ∑Äŗ∑Ź. ŗ∂Öŗ∂īŗ∑ö ŗ∂īŗ∑ä‚Äćŗ∂Ľŗ∂≠ŗ∑íŗ∂īŗ∂≠ŗ∑äŗ∂≠ŗ∑íŗ∑Äŗ∂Ĺŗ∂ß ŗ∑Äŗ∑íŗ∂Ľŗ∑Ēŗ∂Įŗ∑äŗ∂įŗ∑Ä ŗ∑Éŗ∂łŗ∂úŗ∑í ŗ∂Ęŗ∂Ī ŗ∂∂ŗ∂Ĺŗ∑Äŗ∑öŗ∂úŗ∂ļ ŗ∂ļŗ∂łŗ∂öŗ∑ä ŗ∂öŗ∑ďŗ∑Äŗ∑úŗ∂≠ŗ∑ä ŗ∂öŗ∑Öŗ∑úŗ∂≠ŗ∑ä ŗ∂Öŗ∂īŗ∑í ŗ∂íŗ∂öŗ∂ß ŗ∑Äŗ∑íŗ∂Ľŗ∑Ēŗ∂Įŗ∑äŗ∂į ŗ∑Äŗ∑ôŗ∂Īŗ∑Äŗ∑Ź. ŗ∂Ęŗ∑Äŗ∑íŗ∂īŗ∑ô ŗ∂öŗ∑Öŗ∑úŗ∂≠ŗ∑ä ŗ∂íŗ∂öŗ∂ß ŗ∑Äŗ∑íŗ∂Ľŗ∑Ēŗ∂Įŗ∑äŗ∂į ŗ∑Äŗ∑ôŗ∂Īŗ∑Äŗ∑Ź. ŗ∂īŗ∑úŗ∑Ąŗ∑úŗ∂ßŗ∑äŗ∂ßŗ∑Ēŗ∑Ä ŗ∂öŗ∑Öŗ∑úŗ∂≠ŗ∑ä ŗ∂íŗ∂öŗ∂ß ŗ∑Äŗ∑íŗ∂Ľŗ∑Ēŗ∂Įŗ∑äŗ∂į ŗ∑Äŗ∑ôŗ∂Īŗ∑Äŗ∑Ź.

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.
